name: Full Seed Files for Teoyube MVP
description: Full MVP seed layer for Promise Clusters, Covenant Paths, Archetypes, and Prayer templates.

seedFiles.label: Promise Clusters
seedFiles.purpose: Defines the 12 semantic Promise Clusters used by recommendations, prayer generation, and journey navigation.

seedFiles.label: Covenant Paths
seedFiles.purpose: Defines the 12 user journey paths with Teoyube word sequences and Scripture flow.

seedFiles.label: Archetypes
seedFiles.purpose: Defines Kingdom archetypes for onboarding, profile discovery, and recommendation personalization.

seedFiles.label: Prayers
seedFiles.purpose: Defines Scripture-anchored prayer templates linked to Teoyube word sequences.

nextSteps: Connect Promise Cluster pages to data/promiseClusters.json.
Connect Prayer Library to the expanded data/prayers.json.
Use covenantPaths.json for user journey progress.
Use archetypes.json during onboarding and assessment.
Map the full 108-word canon into teoyubeWords.json.
